creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
For what it's worth, I agree this warning is too general.

For example, both patches in emulators/wine-devel are false positives,
and perfectly fine patches, aren't they?

Similarly for lang/gcc6-devel/files/patch-unwind-ia64.h .

My recommendation is to check for explicit timezones 
  [+-][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]
as opposed to checking for the absence of UTC.
